internal_sequencing: Foundation pass (additive-only, cannot break existing runtime):
1a. Commit .furrow/SOURCE_REPO sentinel.
1b. Repair 24 escaped specialist/rules symlinks to ../../specialists/ and ../../.claude/rules/.
1c. Land bin/frw.d/lib/common-minimal.sh as a NEW file sourced by hooks; leave common.sh untouched.
1d. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/rescue.sh (standalone, no common.sh source) with --apply + diagnose-only default. Bundled-baseline heredoc mirrors common-minimal.sh contents.
Foundation tests pass before enforcement:

1e. tests/integration/test-rescue.sh validates (i) HEAD-path recovery, (ii) bundled-baseline-path recovery, (iii) rescue.sh sources no common.sh functions (grep assertion), (iv) bundled baseline diffs cleanly against common-minimal.sh (AD-2 drift check).
Enforcement pass (now safe because rescue exists):
1f. Reduce bin/frw.d/lib/common.sh to exclude the functions moved to common-minimal.sh.
1g. Land pre-commit hooks (type-change block + .bak block). Emit [furrow:warning] to stderr describing what was blocked (visible even when --no-verify bypasses the hook's exit code).
1h. Add .bak patterns to install.sh gitignore bootstrap.
1i. Wire .furrow/SOURCE_REPO branching in install.sh and bin/frw.d/install.sh.
1j. Quarantine install artifacts to $XDG_STATE_HOME/furrow/{repo-slug}/ and write install-state.json.
1k. Sort-by-id on write for seeds.jsonl (tuple: created_at, id) and todos.yaml (same tuple); LC_ALL=C locked.
1l. Self-hosting detection; XDG override; install idempotency; pre-commit blocks; rescue smoke — all as integration tests.

1m. CI contamination-check script added (per OQ-2): greps pushed diff for banned patterns (bin/alm|rws|sds as symlink, bin/*.bak, specialist:*.md targets escaping worktree). Wired to ci_commands in furrow.yaml.
1n. test-precommit-bypass.sh asserts the [furrow:warning] fires on stderr under --no-verify (tests the accepted escape-hatch documentation trail per AD-9).
scope_notes: launch-phase.sh is listed in file_ownership for read-protection only; wave-1 does NOT modify it. All wave-1 edits target install-artifact surfaces (install.sh, frw.d/install.sh, hooks, lib/). See AD-8.

waves.parallel_safety: File ownership disjoint: config-cleanup touches bin/frw dispatcher and schemas/definition+state+promotion-targets; reintegration-summary touches bin/rws and schemas/reintegration. Only overlap is docs, kept separate (self-hosting.md vs config-resolution.md vs implement.md). bin/frw.d/scripts/ is split per deliverable (upgrade.sh vs generate-reintegration.sh).

config-cleanup: 2a. Add resolve_config_value + find_specialist helpers to bin/frw.d/lib/common.sh (not common-minimal.sh); regression test in tests/integration/test-config-resolution.sh (AC-4, AC-5).
2d. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/upgrade.sh + frw upgrade dispatcher case; includes idempotency + migration_version='1.0' write (AC-7).
2f. Wire source_todos through schemas/state.schema.json init + commands/next.md handoff rendering; back-compat for legacy singular source_todo (AC-6).
2g. Scenarios test-specialist-precedence.sh, test-promotion-targets-scaffolding.sh, test-resolver-exports.sh (AC-2, AC-3, AC-4).
worktree-reintegration-summary: 2i. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/generate-reintegration.sh (jq-driven renderer per spec §5) + rws generate-reintegration + rws get-reintegration-json subcommands (AC-R3, AC-R4).
2j. Extend rws validate-summary to accept ## Reintegration section and require both markers; reject rws update-summary reintegration (AC-R1).
2k. Land templates/reintegration.md.tmpl (placeholder-free skeleton per AD-updated AC-R5).
2l. Minimal edit to bin/frw.d/scripts/launch-phase.sh — single worktree-complete hook call (AC-R3, AD-8 — this is the first post-wave-1 touch).
2m. tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh covering schema round-trip, synthetic worktree, install-artifact detection, rescue hint, merge-consumer contract, idempotency (AC-R6).

internal_sequencing: 3a. Land schemas/merge-policy.yaml (literal from spec §2) + schemas/merge-policy.schema.json validator (AC-4).
3b. Land commands/merge.md with five-phase body + argument surface including --resume (AC-1).
3c. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-audit.sh (AC-2) + fixtures for R3 contamination commits.
3d. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-classify.sh (AC-3) + classify.json/classify.md emit.
3e. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-resolve-plan.sh (AC-5) + plan.json/plan.md with inputs_hash + approved:yes marker.
3f. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-execute.sh (AC-6) with deviation check + exit 8 on common.sh break.
3g. Land bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-verify.sh (AC-7) reusing rws validate-sort-invariant (wave-1) and rescue.sh --baseline-check.
3h. Fix bin/frw.d/hooks/script-guard.sh heredoc false positive via shell tokenizer (AC-8).
3i. Wire merge-audit to rws get-reintegration-json (wave-2); no summary.md prose parsing (AC-9).
3j. End-to-end test — tests/integration/test-merge-e2e.sh drives contamination fixture through all 5 phases (AC-10).
